title: Moving Files
drDigitalIntro: Moving a file puts it in a different folder. You can drag a file on top of a folder to drop it inside — or click the file once and then click the folder. Moving files is how you tidy up: put photos in Pictures, documents in Documents. Let's move a file.

playgroundTask.goal: Move a file into the Documents folder

steps.say: Let's tidy up. Drag Budget.xlsx onto the Documents folder — or click Budget.xlsx once, then click Documents.
Let's check it worked. Double-click the Documents folder to see Budget.xlsx now inside.

drDigitalSuccess: You moved Budget.xlsx into Documents and checked it landed there. That's how you organize files into folders.
drDigitalHint: Drag the glowing file onto the glowing folder. Or click the file once, then click the folder once.
